description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black metal slide and frame, featuring a dark brown textured grip panel. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with a squared-off trigger guard and a prominent barrel. The grip appears to be ergonomically contoured for comfort and control, with a visible checkered or stippled pattern for enhanced traction. The slide is smooth and unadorned, lacking visible manufacturer markings or engravings. The magazine base is flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile without any extended or flared features.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a dark brown textured grip and a streamlined, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the dark brown textured grip, squared trigger guard, and smooth slide.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the grip and the alignment of the slide and frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture and the clean, unmarked slide.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening and the front sight, with minimal detail on the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is dark brown with a pronounced checkered or stippled texture, providing a secure and tactile surface. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with a gentle palm swell and subtle finger grooves for ergonomic support. The material appears to be a durable polymer or wood, and there are no visible logos or embellishments. The grip panels are inset into the frame, maintaining a flush and streamlined appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off with a robust, thick profile, offering ample space for finger placement. It features a slight undercut at the rear for improved grip access and control. The surface is smooth and untextured, with no visible reinforcement or accessory rails, giving it a utilitarian and functional look.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, extending slightly beyond the slide with a clean, unthreaded muzzle. It has a round profile with no visible porting, fluting, or compensator attachments. The exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide, and there are no visible markings or decorative elements.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a seamless and compact profile. There are no extensions, flares, finger rests, or visible logos or texturing on the floorplate.
